film.title: Saadi Love Story
film.overview: A romantic awaits her Prince Charming.

dialogues.dialogue: Of course it is mine. This girl is lying in broad daylight. Don't you feel ashamed? Don't you feel ashamed lying? Just a minute, brother. Did your note have any identity mark in it?

This girl is lying in broad daylight. Don't you feel ashamed? Don't you feel ashamed lying? Just a minute, brother. Did your note have any identity mark in it? y es, of course. Gandhi's photo is on it.
I don't play cricket. you don't play cricket? Aren't you ashamed to trouble an innocent girl? y ou are mistaken. It is not so. Hear me out. What is wrong with you?

Rascals, why don't you tell me which one of you is the real Rajveer? They are causing unnecessary mess in our life. Aren't you ashamed of being freeloaders? I wonder from where have these scoundrels come. Sonam, listen to me.

I know where the money came from. you know? - y es. Last night when I went to grandpa's room..Shame on you. Weren't Rs. 30 lakhs enough....that you have come here to get some more? No, I had come to keep them back. It is like my own house.
Huh? I love you. Love you ! Oh, my! So proud of you, sister Gurleen. How romantic! What happened next? What else could have happened?
